summary.text:
ChartWrapper - Wrapper component for charts with loading and empty states

Handles three states:
- Loading: Shows skeleton loader
- No data: Shows empty state placeholder
- Has data: Shows chart content

summary.text:
ChartWrapper - Wrapper component for charts with loading and empty states

Handles three states:
- Loading: Shows skeleton loader
- No data: Shows empty state placeholder
- Has data: Shows chart content
Bitdeer dual-tank (1–2) and immersion dual-supply (1–2) series indices in overview adapters.
Constants for Inventory table pagination persistence
LineChartCard - Composable card with timeline selector, legend, chart, and stats footer

children.name: miner-av-a1346

type.value: A1346 miners do not report consumption individually, so Avg. efficiency cannot be calculated

children.defaultValue: 'A1346 miners do not report consumption individually, so Avg. efficiency cannot be calculated'

children.name: SETUP_POOLS_WARNING_MESSAGE

type.value: Setup pool can cause a loss of efficiency during mining operations. It is recommended to setup pool when the miner is in Sleep mode.

children.defaultValue: 'Setup pool can cause a loss of efficiency during mining operations. It is recommended to setup pool when the miner is in Sleep mode.'

summary.text:
Bitdeer Options Component

Main container for Bitdeer cooling system options.
Displays dry cooler and pumps components.

Bitdeer Pumps Component

Displays exhaust fan status using an indicator.

Bitdeer Container Settings Component

Displays container parameter settings and editable threshold forms
for Bitdeer containers with oil temperature and tank pressure monitoring.

Includes:
- Container parameter display (MAC address, serial number, etc.)
- Editable threshold forms for oil temperature and tank pressure
- Color-coded alerts and flash indicators
- Sound alert configuration

Tank Temperature Charts for Bitdeer containers

Displays oil and water temperature readings (hot and cold) for a specific tank.

Features:
- Tank Oil TempL (Cold) - Yellow line (4px)
- Tank Oil TempH (Hot) - Violet line
- Tank Water TempL (Cold) - Blue line
- Tank Water TempH (Hot) - Sky Blue line

Bitmain Basic Settings Component

Main settings view displaying:
- Cooling system status (pumps and fans)
- Power distribution
- GPS positioning

BitMain Controls Tab Component

Displays container controls including:
- Container fan status
- Tank levels (A, B, C, D)
- GPS location (latitude/longitude)

Bitmain Cooling System Component

Displays the status of cooling system components including:
- Circulating pump
- Fluid infusion pump
- Fans (1-2)
- Cooling tower fans (1-3)

Bitmain Hydro Liquid Temperature Charts

Displays secondary liquid supply temperature readings (Temp1 and Temp2) for Bitmain Hydro containers.

Features:
- Sec. Liquid supply Temp1 - Sky Blue line
- Sec. Liquid supply Temp2 - Violet line
- Interactive legend for toggling series
- Timeline selector (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d)
- Current temperature display

content.text:
```tsx
<BitMainHydroLiquidTemperatureCharts
  tag="container1"
  chartTitle="Liquid Temperature"
  data={tempData}
  timeline="24h"
  showLegend
  showRangeSelector
/>
```

summary.text:
BitMain Hydro Settings Component

Main settings view for BitMain Hydro containers displaying:
- Basic settings (cooling system, power, positioning)
- Threshold configuration forms (water temperature, pressure)

BitMain Immersion Control Box Component

A flexible container component with configurable columns and optional bottom content.
Used for displaying control information in a structured layout.

BitMain Immersion Pump Station Control Box Component

Displays pump station status including:
- Alarm/Normal status
- Ready state
- Operating state
- Started state

BitMain Immersion Settings Component

Settings form for BitMain immersion containers with temperature threshold configuration.

BitMain Immersion System Status Component

Displays system status information including:
- Server start permission
- Connection status
BitMain Immersion Unit Control Box Component

Bitmain Liquid Pressure Charts

Displays supply and return liquid pressure readings for Bitmain containers.
Converts pressure values from MPa to bar for display.

Features:
- Supply Liquid Pressure - Sky Blue line
- Return Liquid Pressure - Violet line
- Automatic MPa to bar conversion
- Interactive legend for toggling series
- Timeline selector (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d)
- Current pressure display

content.text:
```tsx
<BitMainLiquidPressureCharts
  tag="container1"
  chartTitle="Liquid Pressure"
  data={pressureData}
  timeline="24h"
  showLegend
  showRangeSelector
/>
```

summary.text:
Bitmain Liquid Temperature Charts

Displays supply and return liquid temperature readings for Bitmain containers.

Features:
- Supply Liquid Temp - Sky Blue line
- Return Liquid Temp - Violet line
- Interactive legend for toggling series
- Timeline selector (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d)
- Current temperature display

content.text:
```tsx
<BitMainLiquidTempCharts
  tag="container1"
  chartTitle="Liquid Temperature"
  data={tempData}
  timeline="24h"
  showLegend
  showRangeSelector
/>
```

summary.text:
Bitmain Power and Positioning Component

Displays power distribution and GPS location information:
- Distribution box #1 and #2 power consumption
- Latitude and longitude coordinates with direction

Bitmain Power Charts

Displays power consumption for Bitmain containers with distribution boxes.
Shows total power and individual power for each distribution box.
Automatically calculates total power from the sum of both boxes and formats
the display units (kW/MW) based on the power magnitude.

Features:
- Total Power - Sky Blue line (sum of both boxes)
- Dist. Box 1 Power - Violet line
- Dist. Box 2 Power - Red line
- Interactive legend for toggling series
- Timeline selector (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d)
- Current power consumption display with auto unit (W/kW/MW)
- Automatic kW to W conversion for chart display

content.text:
```tsx
<BitMainPowerCharts
  tag="container1"
  chartTitle="Power Consumption"
  data={powerData}
  timeline="24h"
  showLegend
  showRangeSelector
/>
```

summary.text:
Bitmain Supply Liquid Flow Charts

Displays supply liquid flow rate for Bitmain containers in cubic meters per hour (m³/h).

Features:
- Supply Liquid Flow - Sky Blue line
- Interactive timeline selector (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d)
- Current flow rate display
- Optional legend and range selector

content.text:
```tsx
<BitMainSupplyLiquidFlowCharts
  tag="container1"
  chartTitle="Supply Liquid Flow"
  data={flowData}
  timeline="24h"
  showRangeSelector
/>
```

summary.text:
Container Fan Legend Component

Displays a single fan status with number and icon.

Container Fans Card Component

Displays a grid of fan status indicators.
Shows fan number and on/off state with icon.

Dry Cooler Component

Displays dry cooler status with fans and associated pumps.
Shows two cooler groups with fan status indicators and pump controls.

Fire Status Box Component
x
Displays fire safety and environmental monitoring status.

Gauge Chart Component

Displays a value as a gauge/speedometer chart with label and unit.

Generic Data Box Component

Displays a table of label-value-unit rows.
Get Bitdeer container parameter settings
Get container parameter settings based on container type

content.text: Parameter settings object or undefined if container type not supported

summary.text: Device data
Get MicroBT container parameter settings

MicroBT Cooling Component

Displays cooling system status for MicroBT containers including:
- Cycle pump status
- Main circulation pump (status, switch, speed)
- Cooling fan (status, switch, speed)
- Make-up water pump (status, switch, fault)

MicroBT Settings Component

Settings form for MicroBT containers with temperature threshold configuration.

Miner Metric Card Component

Displays key metrics for a miner including:
- Efficiency (fixed position top-right)
- Hash rate, Temperature
- Frequency, Consumption
- Optional secondary stats in grid

Miners Summary Box Component

Displays mining summary parameters in a 2-column grid layout.
Accepts pre-formatted values - consumers handle data formatting.

content.text:
```tsx
<MinersSummaryBox
  params={[
    { label: 'Efficiency', value: '32.5 W/TH/S' },
    { label: 'Hash Rate', value: '1.24 PH/s' },
    { label: 'Max Temp', value: '72 °C' },
    { label: 'Avg Temp', value: '65 °C' },
  ]}
/>
```

summary.text:
Power Meters Component

Displays power meter readings for container devices including:
- Communication status
- Voltage measurements (A-B, B-C, C-A)
- Power factor and frequency
- Active and apparent power
- Energy consumption

Secondary Stat Card Component

Displays a secondary statistic with a name and value in a card format.

content.text:
```tsx
<SecondaryStatCard name="Hashrate" value="95.5 TH/s" />
<SecondaryStatCard name="Uptime" value={99.8} />
<SecondaryStatCard name="Efficiency" value="92%" />
```

summary.text:
Single Stat Card Component

Displays a single statistic with optional animations and variants.

content.text:
```tsx
<SingleStatCard name="Temperature" value={42} unit="°C" />
<SingleStatCard name="Hashrate" value="95.5" unit="TH/s" variant="secondary" />
<SingleStatCard name="Alarm" value="Critical" color="red" flash />
```

summary.text:
Socket Component

Displays a socket in a PDU with power/current info, miner status, and heatmap visualization

Features:
- Power and current display
- Miner status indicators
- Heatmap mode with temperature/hashrate
- Cooling fan indicator
- Socket enable/disable states
- Add miner flow

Stats Group Card Component

Displays aggregated statistics for selected miners:
- Hash rate, Temperature, Frequency, Consumption
- Optional: Power mode, Uptime, LED, Status (for single miner)

Can render in two modes:
- Miner Metrics: Uses MinerMetricCard layout
- Stats Grid: Uses SingleStatCard and SecondaryStatCard in rows

Status Item Component

Displays a label with a colored status indicator.

content.text:
```tsx
<StatusItem label="Temperature" status="normal" />
<StatusItem label="Pressure" status="warning" />
<StatusItem label="Flow" status="fault" />
```

summary.text:
TanksBox Component

Displays tank rows with temperature, pressure, and oil/water pump status.

Plays a repeating two-tone alarm at a configurable interval.

Useful for critical alerts (e.g., overheating containers) where an audible
notification is needed to draw the operator's attention.

By default the alarm is synthesised at runtime via the Web Audio API as a
pair of alternating tones (high → low) — no asset ships with the package.
Pass
`src`
to play a custom file URL instead.

Hook to check if chart data is empty or unavailable

Returns
`true`

if data is empty/unavailable (should show empty state)
Returns
`false`
if data exists (should show chart)

content.text: Boolean indicating if data is empty

```tsx
const isEmpty = useChartDataCheck({ data: { dataset: customData } })

return isEmpty ? <EmptyState /> : <CustomChart data={data} />
```

summary.text: Direct dataset for BarChart components

dataset.text: Dataset property inside the dataset parameter (for custom charts)

data.text: Data property inside the dataset parameter (for charts with data object)

summary.text:
Hook to check if user has specific permission

Memoized for performance - only recalculates when permissions config changes.

content.text: true if user has the requested permission

summary.text: Permission criteria to check
Hook to check user permissions

content.text: Function that checks if user has the requested permission(s)

summary.text: Hook to check if the current user has the capability to edit feature flags.

content.text: true if the user has the 'features' capability

summary.text: Custom hook for type-safe localStorage access with cross-tab sync.

content.text:
```tsx
const [theme, setTheme, removeTheme] = useLocalStorage('theme', 'dark')
setTheme('light')
setTheme((prev) => prev === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark')
removeTheme()
```

summary.text: localStorage key
fallback value when key is missing or invalid

Custom hook for showing notifications with Redux integration.
Uses @tetherto/mdk-core-ui Toast and Toaster components.

content.text:
```tsx
const { notifySuccess, notifyError } = useNotification()

notifySuccess('Success', 'Your changes were saved.')
notifyError('Error', 'Something went wrong.', { dontClose: true })
```

summary.text: Custom hook for managing pagination state

Hook for timezone management and date formatting

Provides access to the current timezone and utilities for formatting dates
with timezone awareness.

content.text: Object with timezone state and formatting utilities
